title: Miniature parrot on a fruit vase for a dollhouse in 1:12 scale
description: A bright and highly detailed miniature featuring a colorful parrot perched on a vase filled with fruits. The composition captures a lively scene with carefully crafted elements, creating a realistic and eye-catching decoration for a dollhouse interior. Please note that the set includes only the parrot on the vase; all other items shown are for display purposes only. All elements, including the parrot, are securely attached to the vase.
